subject: Re: Fwd: N909JE lines and reg number
body:
yes

----- Original Message ----
From: "lvjet@aol.com" <lvjet@aol.com>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Cc: Sarah Kellen <kellens@earthlink.net>
Sent: Friday, June 29, 2007 12:01:27 PM
Subject: Fw: Fwd: N909JE lines and reg number


Is this N number location approved?

Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld

-----Original Message-----
From: jetcare@aol.com

Date: Thu, 28 Jun 2007 15:24:30 
To:kellens@earthlink.net, lvjet@aol.com
Subject: Fwd: N909JE lines and reg number


The antenna does not appear to be a factor in these pics.  The number was lowered only 5".  Please let me know what you think soon so we can start the white.
Regards,
Larry


-----Original Message-----
From: Todd Stewart <todd@goderichaircraft.com>
To: jetcare@aol.com
Sent: Thu, 28 Jun 2007 12:06 pm
Subject: N909JE lines and reg number




Larry;
 
I hope you are having a good day. I have attached some pictures that show the relationship between the lines and reg. number to the antenna. Please let me know what you think of how this looks. I will send a few pictures early this afternoon with all the lines in place. I just wanted to address this issue as soon as we could.
 
Take care, and I’ll talk to you soon!
 
Todd
